# Crushing

**Summary**: A standard mechanical test to measure the compressive strength of a solid cement sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] applied crushing method to determine the ultimate compressive strength of 6 samples per system.
